<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-ê]][[de:Metall-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre de métal]][[hak:Sîn-vi]][[ja:辛未]][[ko:신미 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Schaap]][[vi:Tân Mùi]][[za:Sinmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-bī]][[zh-yue:辛未]][[zh:辛未]]

'''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as [[Yin Metal Goat]]（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following [[Yang Metal Horse]] and preceding [[Yang Water Monkey]]. In the [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] [[Kanoto (辛)]] represents Yin [[Metal (wuxing)|Metal (金)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[wèi|Goat (未)]] represents Yin [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], forming a [[Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: shinbi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi

==Years of Yin Metal Goat==
A year in the [[Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Xīnwèi Years'''
|-
![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
*[[:en:Qq|Qq]]
*[[71]]
*[[131]]
*[[191]]
*[[251]]
*[[311]]
*[[371]]
*[[431]]
*[[491]]
*[[551]]
*[[611]]
*[[671]]
*[[731]]
*[[791]]
*[[851]]
*[[911]]
*[[971]]
|
*[[1031]]
*[[1091]]
*[[1151]]
*[[1211]]
*[[1271]]
*[[1331]]
*[[1391]]
*[[1451]]
*[[1511]]
*[[1571]]
*[[1631]]
*[[1691]]
*[[1751]]
*[[1811]]
*[[1871]]
*[[1931]]
*[[1991]]
|
*[[2051]]
*[[2111]]
*2171
*2231
*2291
*2351
*2411
*2471
*[[2531]]
*[[2591]]
*[[2651]]
*[[2711]]
*[[2771]]
*[[2831]]
*2891
*2951
|}

==Months of Yin Metal Goat==
In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to [[Kinoe (甲)]] or [[Tsuchinoto (己)]] in the [[Heavenly Stems]]), the [[June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or the [[Solar term]] (from [[Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).

==Days of Yin Metal Goat==
Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the [[Senjitsu]] system.

=== Selected Days ===
A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)|大土]].
==See Also==
<!--Yin Metal Goat--><!--Yin Metal Goat-->

{{wikidata link|Q1062873}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
